nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Setup and usage guide for the Elasticsearch sink integration test, providing step-by-step instructions for running the RisingWave-to-Elasticsearch sinking demo.

nodes.name: create_mv.sql
nodes.summary: Creates a RisingWave materialized view that aggregates user behavior data for use as the input to the Elasticsearch sink.

nodes.name: create_sink.sql
nodes.summary: Defines multiple RisingWave sinks targeting different Elasticsearch index configurations, covering append, upsert, and full data type testing scenarios.

nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: Creates `user_behaviors` and `es_types` source tables in RisingWave, both with an extensive set of data type columns for comprehensive Elasticsearch sink type mapping validation.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for the Elasticsearch sink integration test, starting Elasticsearch, Kibana, Kafka, and RisingWave containers.
